node.text: He made at least one dream come true 😂
يعم ابسط اهو في حاجه اتحققة 😂😂
I was expecting TCK since it had a 🇺🇦 licenseplate
Awww man never trust a dream wee
When he found the money the second time i knew he had pissed his pants😢
Started honest, ended in full fantasy mode
That is Ford sierra behind your car. 😂
@_tomiiicek_ good spot what an iconic car, prefer the Orion personally.
Moral :enjoy first then celebrate so that you won't regret to be woke up next time 🙃
In Deutschland wird der Traum war 😅
Wieso rassistisch sein????? Oh wow hab mich verschrieben, freu dich
@kudalaut__ keknya lebih ke ngompol ga bg?
@tff.rajat7 don't let this meme die yet
